Privacy Policy

1. Information We Collect

This website does not collect personal information directly from users. However, the following information may be automatically collected for service improvement:

  • Browser type and version
  • Operating system
  • Visit date and time
  • Language settings

2. Cookies & Advertising

This website displays ads through Google AdSense. Google may use cookies to show interest-based advertisements.

Users can disable personalized ads in Google Ad Settings. Google Ad Settings

3. Local Storage

We use browser local storage to save game scores and language settings. This data is stored only on your device and is not transmitted to servers.

4. Third-Party Services

This website uses the following third-party services:

  • Google AdSense (Advertising)
  • GitHub Pages (Hosting)

5. Children's Privacy

This website does not intentionally collect personal information from children under 13.

6. Contact

If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at: pjhk579700@naver.com

7. Changes

This privacy policy may be changed as needed. Changes will be updated on this page.

Last updated: 2026-04-12

© 2026 InstaIdea
